template.name: Comprehensive Data Quality Monitoring & Alerting
template.description: Enterprise-grade data quality monitoring template with automated validation rules, anomaly detection, trend analysis, and intelligent alerting. Monitors data freshness, completeness, consistency, and accuracy across multiple data sources.

text.text: *🚨 CRITICAL DATA QUALITY ALERT*\n\n{{classified_anomalies.critical.length}} critical issues require immediate attention

data_sources.description: Array of data sources to monitor with connection details and quality rules

documentation.setup_guide:
1. Configure data source connections and monitoring rules
2. Set up dashboard database for metrics storage
3. Configure PagerDuty integration for critical alerts
4. Set up Slack channels for notifications
5. Define quality thresholds and business rules
6. Test with sample data sources
7. Schedule regular monitoring runs
8. Review and tune alerting thresholds

troubleshooting.false_positive_alerts: Review and adjust anomaly detection thresholds
troubleshooting.missed_anomalies: Lower sensitivity thresholds or add more validation rules
troubleshooting.alert_fatigue: Implement alert suppression and escalation policies
troubleshooting.slow_monitoring: Optimize SQL queries or reduce monitoring frequency
